roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/DAWT/X:PETITION WITHDRAWN AND DISMISSED,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 06-01-15 WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS, GOOD CAUSE FOUND /X:PAROLEE DISCHARGED FROM PAROLE ASOF 8-3-15 BY ORDER OF THE BOARD OF PAROLE HEARINGS,/

/CAL:4011,6 & 5  (3056 PTR)/DAWT/X:COURT ORDERS THE DEPARTMENT OF ADULT PAROLE TO PREPARE AN AUDIT OF DESMOND STITES'S PAROLE TO ASCERTAIN AN ACCURATE DISCHARGE DATE,COURT ORDERS THE DEPARTMENT OF ADULT PAROLE TO REFER THISMATTER TO THE BOARD OF PAROLE HEARINGS FOR A POSSIBLE EARLY DISCHARGE BASEDON THE FOLLOWINGFINDING:  PAROLEE, DESMOND STITES, SUFFERS FROM A COGNITIVE DISORDER DUE TO A TRAUMATIC BRAIN INJURY, WHICH MAKES IT HIGHLY UNLIKELYTHAT HE WILL EVER BE ABLE TO MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF PAROLE SUPERVISION,IN ADDITION, HAD HIS COMMITMENT OFFENSE OCCURRED AFTER REALIGNMENT LAW CHANGES, HIS MATTER WOULD BE UNDER THE JURISDICTION OF THE SAN FRANCISCO ADULTPROBATION DEPARTMENT AS A POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION (PRCS) MATTER,/CONTD:7-27-2015 FOR DISCHARGE DATE AUDIT AND STATUS OF POSSIBLE EARLY PAROLE DISCHARGE,/DOPC/

/CAL:3056 PTR/DAWT/28    PPTR HEARING-(PAROLE)/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUEAS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND PARTIES STIPULATE TO  PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP: 6-29-15/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT TO EVALUATE PAROLEE FOR POSSIBLE CONSERVATORSHIP AND, OR REFERRAL TO CITY WIDE CASE MANAGEMENT/CTORD:4011,5 FOR PAROLEE'S DENTAL EXAMINATION/
